---
title: "Tutorials"
description: "Step-by-step tutorials to help you get the most out of Positron, from setting up an environment to running your first data analysis."
listing:
  - id: tutorials
    type: custom
    template: templates/welcome-card.ejs
    contents:
      - title: "First data analysis with Python in a Jupyter Notebook"
        description: "Set up a Python environment, open a Jupyter Notebook, and perform your first data analysis."
        icon: "bi-journal-code"
        link: "tutorial-get-started-ipynb.qmd"
        columns: 2
      - title: "First data analysis with R in a Quarto document"
        description: "Set up an R environment, open a Quarto document, and perform your first data analysis."
        icon: "bi-code-slash"
        link: "tutorial-get-started-quarto.qmd"
        columns: 2
      - title: "Migrate from VS Code to Positron"
        description: "You already know the VS Code interface. Learn what is different in Positron and how it makes a better editor for data science."
        icon: "bi-signpost-2"
        link: "tutorial-migrate-from-vscode.qmd"
        columns: 2
      - title: "Migrate from RStudio to Positron"
        description: "Set up Positron so it looks, feels, and responds like the RStudio you already know."
        icon: "bi-luggage"
        link: "tutorial-migrate-from-RStudio.qmd"
        columns: 2
---

Learn how to get the most out of Positron.

::: {#tutorials}
:::

Also see [Features](features.qmd) to learn about how Positron can keep you productive for all your data science work.
